title: Home
text:
Discord as a Digital Third Space in STEM
This site will hold my master’s thesis research on how Discord can support students engagement, help-seeking, and retention in introductory chemistry courses.

title: Methods
text: As of Spring Semester 2026, I will process Discord logs, code message types, and analyze correlations between engagement and performance.
